如果涉及 UI 改动，请提供截图、GIF 或录屏。

### Verification / 验证方式

<!--
Please describe how you tested this change.
请说明你如何验证本次改动。
-->

- [ ] `flutter analyze`
- [ ] `flutter test`
- [ ] `cargo test` in `spring_note/rust`
- [ ] `flutter build windows --release`
- [ ] Manual test / 手动测试：

---

### Checklist / 检查清单

- [ ] This PR has a clear scope and does not include unrelated changes. / 本 PR 范围清晰，不包含无关改动。
- [ ] I have tested the affected feature or explained why testing is not applicable. / 我已测试受影响功能，或说明了为什么不适用测试。
- [ ] If this changes UI, I have attached screenshots or recordings. / 如果修改了 UI，我已附上截图或录屏。
- [ ] If this changes dependencies, I have updated the correct files such as `pubspec.yaml`, `pubspec.lock`, `Cargo.toml`, or `Cargo.lock`. / 如果修改了依赖，我已更新 `pubspec.yaml`、`pubspec.lock`、`Cargo.toml` 或 `Cargo.lock` 等对应文件。
- [ ] This PR does not expose API keys, tokens, local paths, or private user data. / 本 PR 没有暴露 API Key、Token、本地路径或用户隐私数据。
- [ ] This PR does not introduce malicious code. / 本 PR 没有引入恶意代码。

### Breaking changes / 破坏性变更

- [ ] This is NOT a breaking change. / 这不是破坏性变更。
- [ ] This is a breaking change and I have explained the impact below. / 这是破坏性变更，我已在下方说明影响。

<!-- If this is a breaking change, describe the impact and migration path here. / 如果这是破坏性变更，请在这里说明影响和迁移方式。 -->
